scope: WB-1 / BB-12 / GB-001 — Login 500 on missing level/role

env.db: sqlite (test seed, polluted by prior runs)

findings.title: POST /api/login returns 500 with full stack trace when level/role omitted
findings.claim: Login with only {username,password} yields 500 with full stack trace.

evidence.body_trace_leak: Full Laravel framework internal call path, file paths, and class names

root_cause.logic: Validation rules mark 'level' and 'role' as 'sometimes|required'. AuthController line 23: `$level = $validated['level'] ?? $validated['role'];` — when both absent, `??` falls through to the second key which is also undefined, triggering PHP 8 'Undefined array key' ErrorException instead of returning 401. No defensive coalesce to null.
root_cause.amplifier: APP_DEBUG=true (apps/api/.env line 4) causes Laravel to render full stack trace + file paths + line numbers in the JSON 500 response.

cwe: CWE-209 (Generation of Error Message Containing Sensitive Information)
CWE-754 (Improper Check for Unusual or Exceptional Conditions)
refute_attempts: Refute angle A: 'Maybe debug=false in real env'. Counter: APP_DEBUG=true in apps/api/.env line 4. Even if dev-only, dev/staging environments are exposed and the underlying missing-key bug still returns 500 (just without trace). Both are bugs.
Refute angle B: 'Maybe it's a 401 mis-routed as 500'. Counter: body is ErrorException, not AuthController's 401 message. Confirmed framework-level unhandled exception.
Refute angle C: 'One-line fix trivializes severity'. Counter: triviality does not negate the bug; production path still leaks paths/framework internals to any unauthenticated caller.
findings.evidence_quality: Strong — direct reproduction matches claim exactly.

findings.title: POST /api/transactions/pay returns 500 with full stack trace on insufficient stock
findings.claim: Pay with qty > stock returns 500 with stack trace.

reproduction_a.verdict_a: REFUTED ON LAYANAN 6 — but due to test-state pollution, not code defect

evidence.body_message: Stok FIFO tidak cukup untuk produk #2 (butuh 99999, tersedia 18).
evidence.body_trace_leak: Full Laravel framework internal call path, file paths, and class names

root_cause.logic: decrementStock() throws RuntimeException on insufficient FIFO stock. TransaksiService.pay() and TransaksiController do not catch it. No mapping to 422 ValidationException or domain-specific exception handler. App\Exceptions\Handler not present; bootstrap/app.php only sets shouldRenderJsonWhen, leaving default Laravel 500 render with full stack when APP_DEBUG=true.
root_cause.amplifier: Same APP_DEBUG=true. Without a custom renderer, Laravel 12 default + debug=true emits exception, file, line, trace to JSON.

cwe: CWE-754 (Improper Check for Unusual or Exceptional Conditions)
CWE-209 (Generation of Error Message Containing Sensitive Information)
refute_attempts: Refute angle A: 'RuntimeException is mapped to 422 via global handler'. Counter: bootstrap/app.php (D:/users/stefa/project/sim-kk/apps/api/bootstrap/app.php lines 23-27) only configures shouldRenderJsonWhen. No exception::render() callback maps RuntimeException to 422. apps/api/app/Exceptions/Handler.php does not exist (Glob returned no files). Confirm: bug is unhandled.

Refute angle B: 'Original repro used layanan 6 qty=999 which returned 201'. Counter: tinker inspection shows produk 1 has a polluted batch with qty=9998899048 (id=20, batch='HUGE-1') from a prior fuzz test. The stock check code is correct; the test DB state is the artifact. Reproduction_b with layanan 7 (produk 2, no pollution) deterministically returns 500 with stack trace.

Refute angle C: 'Maybe it only fires on qty > INT_MAX'. Counter: qty=99999 on layanan 7 (stock=18) reproduces consistently. qty=100 was not tested but qty=99999 is sufficient to demonstrate the absence of validation and exception mapping.
Refute angle D: 'Trivial fix silences the bug'. Counter: a 1-line `if ($available < $qty) throw ValidationException::withMessages(...)` would map it to 422. Trivial does not equal non-existent.
findings.evidence_quality: Strong — direct reproduction matches claim, cross-checked with two service ids (one polluted, one clean).

summary.notes: Both findings survive adversarial refutation. The 500-on-missing-level bug is unconditional (no env dependency for the underlying exception). The 500-on-insufficient-stock bug requires APP_DEBUG=true for full trace leak, but the RuntimeException → 500 (instead of 422) is unconditional. Two prior polluted DB rows (one absurdly high batch, one with path-traversal batch code) indicate earlier verification steps also produced unsafe states worth flagging in synthesis.
